name: Allt yr Esgair
highlights: Wooded ridge with Iron Age hillfort and superb views of Llangorse & Beacons.
points_of_interest: Iron Age hillfort; Roman road below
viewpoints: Llangorse Lake below; Pen y Fan horseshoe across the valley
picnic_spots: On the summit ridge in a clearing
food_drink_nearby: New Inn Bwlch; Griffin Felin Fach
hazards_notes: Steep in places; can be muddy
